meaning: n.狡猾的人,单桅三角帆平底帆船
examples: You will find the occasional sharpie who watches for the amber to come up on the adjacent set of lights.
Use a Sharpie to write your vegetable and fruit names.
If you scuff a shoe, he reveals, "a Sharpie the color of your shoe can save the day!"
The sharpie traders unload their new purchase at a higher price, pocketing a tidy profit.
Keys allegedly attempted to get Sharpie back into the system but was unable.
